summary: Completed comprehensive testing of RecurringExpenseManager feature. Successfully tested form functionality, item creation, toggle/delete operations, summary calculations, and navigation. All core features working correctly.
passed_tests: Settings page shows 'Recurring Expenses' section with summary pills (Active count, Monthly Est.)
Add Template button opens recurring expense form with all required fields
Successfully created Car Insurance recurring expense (£45, monthly, insurance category)
Successfully created Phone Plan recurring expense (£12, weekly)
Summary pills update correctly: Active=2, Monthly Est.=£96.96 (45 + 12*4.33 calculation)
Toggle functionality works - items become inactive (faded/strikethrough)
Delete functionality works - items removed from list
Summary calculations update dynamically after toggle/delete operations
Form validation works (disabled submit when required fields empty)
All form fields functional: description, amount, category, frequency, start date, VAT checkbox
List items display with toggle buttons, frequency badges, and delete buttons
Navigation between all tabs works: Dashboard, Mileage, Expenses, Work Log, Tax Logic, Settings
RecurringExpenseManager positioned correctly between Financial Allocations and Backup/Restore sections
